titleStmt.title: SII 29.63: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 63. (A.R. No. B. 745 of 1962-63.) ANDUR, TULJAPUR TALUK, OSMANABAD DISTRICT, MAHARASHTRA.

summary.p: Slab fixed into a dilapidated wall in the village.

It records a gift of the village Beṭṭakeṟeyur for worship, offerings and burning lamps in the temple of Māṇikēśvara of Aṇādūr by yuvarāja Mallikārjunadēva at the instance of mahāpradhāna maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyaka Nāchimarasa when the emperor Tribhuvanamalladēva was ruling the empire from the capital Kalyāṇa. The nāḍa-adhikaris [officers of the Divison] were made responsible for protecting and maintaining this dharma. Also it records a grant of 42 mattar land which includes 12 mattar land situated in Sāntayanāyakana kēri, to the god Māṇikēśvara by Bāḷeya-seṭṭi.

At the instance of Anantapāḷa daṇḍanāyaka the tax chchhatra, chchhāya suṅka was gifted (to the god) by suṅkaverggaḍe Sōmanāthayya-nāyaka and Dāsimarasa. Further at the instance of yuvaraja vallabha Mallikārjuna income from taxes on various commodities was granted by suṅkaverggaḍe Sōbhana-nāyaka of Āṇadūr-300 and others. The Telligas [oil-pressers] also granted oil for burning perpetual lamp and for Chaitra[māsa] celebrations. The three Seṭṭis and the nāḍaadhikari were made responsible for the protection and maintenance of all these grants to the temple.

As post script another grant is also recorded which states that Māgarasa of Moraṁba made a grant of 100 mattar land for special offerings to god in the months of Chaitra, Śrāvaṇa and Dīpāvaḷi celebrations.

It is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 32, (Śaka 1029) Sarvajitu, Margaśira, amāvāsye, Sunday, Chūḍāmaṇi grahaṇa corresponding to 1107 A.D., December 16. The weekday was however, Monday on which day there was a Solar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatuṁga siraḥcuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyā
śraya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēva vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
viddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrarkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁ
kathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire svasti samasta bhuvana vikhyātaṁ cāḷukyānvaya prasūtaṁ Ā
rtijana pārijātaṁ ripurāya kuvara baṁgāṟaṁ bappanaṁkakāṟaṁ kuvaraṁka bhīmaṁ nayanābhirāmaṁ
kumāra (vi)dyābōjaṁgaṁ Ayyana siṁgaṁ saraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara kumaraḍi kuṁjaraṁ vīravidyādharaṁ
sakaḷa kaḷādharaṁ paḍanāḷagiri vajradaṇḍaṁ vi ḷarāya kuvara javadaṁḍaṁ mahālakṣmīdēvī labda
varaprasādaṁ tyāgavīrnidaṁ mūrurāya kumāra hritsellaṁ sāhasamallaṁ śrīmatribhuvana ma
lla paṭṭa mahādēviyaraṇugaṁ nāmādi samasta prasasti sahitaṁ śrīmatu yuvarāja vallabhaṁ mallikā
rjunadēvaru tatpādapadmōpa jīvi samadhigata paṁca mahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpra
caṁḍa daṁḍanāyakaṁ vidvajjana varadāyakaṁ sakaḷaguṇamaṇibhūṣaṇaṁ baṁdhujana pōṣaṇaṁ
Āśritajana kalpavrikṣaṁ prati kāryadakṣa sāhitya vidyāprasaṁgaṁ Ayyana siṁgaṁ śrī mattri
bhuvanamalladēva pādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādi samasta prasasti sahitaṁ śrīma
nmahāpradhānaṁ maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ nācimarasara biṁnapadiṁ yuvarāja vallabha ma
llikārjuna dēvaru śrī maccāḷukya vikrama varṣada 32 neya sarvvajitu saṁvatsara mārggaśiradamāvāssye
Ādityavāra cūḍāmaṇi grahaṇa mahāparvvanimittadiṁ Āṇādūra śrīmāṇikēśvara
dēvarige Aṁgabhōga dhūpadīpa nivēdya tāṁbūḷakke beṭṭakeṟeyūraṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi koṭṭa
rīdhammamaṁ nāḍadhikārigaḷalu svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru śrī māṇikēśvaradēvarige bāḷeya
seṭṭiyaru biṭṭa kōla mattaru mūvattuṁ sāṁtayanāyakana kēriyalu mattaru haṁneraḍu Anti
vara dānadiṁ nālvatteraḍu mattaru keyumaṁ śrīmadanantapāḷa daṇḍanāyakara besadiṁda
parasuṁkaverggaḍe sōmanāthayya nāyakaruṁ dāsimarasaruṁ biṭṭa cchatracchāya suṁkamaṁ
śrīmadyuvarāja vallabhaṁ mallikārjuna dēvara besadiṁ mallapayyanāyakaru biṭṭa herjuṁka maṁ
525 Ettiṁge Āṇādūra 300 ṟa suṁkaverggaḍe sōbhana nāyakaru punaccaraṇaṁ mā
kha suṁka garavaṁ Āḷa gāmuṁḍanaṁ mukhyaṁ māḍi sarvabādha parihāravāgi biṭṭaru Arasuga
ḷaṁ mūvaru seṭṭiyaru nakharamuṁ taḷāṟaru viḻdu Āvajada māna saṭṭuga sahitavāgi bi
ṭṭaru haṁnavaṇaṁ Eleya hēṟiṁge Ele 50 hoṁge 5 Aḍakeyumaṁ dēvasvavaḷa haṁsarada
loṁdadara Ereḍeleyumaṁ biṭṭaru telligaru (cai)trakkaṁ gāṇadalu dirbbaḷa Eṇṇiyama nandādīvige
ge dēvasavaḷaṁ bāḷike Ondukaṁ biṭṭaru Ī dharmakaṁnavaramaṁ mūruseṭṭiyaru nāḍadhikārigaḷu
śva(sva)dharmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . moraṁbada māgarasaru dēvargge kālgarcci koṭṭa mattaru 100
dēvara purake naḍavākalalu cai[cha ?]trakke 30 ttaṟiṁge dramma 3 śrāvaṇakke dramma 2 dipāvaḷige dramma 1 .
Digital edition of SII 29.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
